name: Specials Filter
description: Removes specials (Season 0) from configured TV show libraries after each library scan. Configurable per library and per show.
overview: Removes specials (Season 0) from configured TV show libraries after each library scan. Configurable per library and per show.

versions.changelog:
Pr run now (#2)

* Added a Run Now button instead of requiring a full library scan

* run now version
Fix the issue where if you haven't loaded each library in the dropdown it removes the show config
this should fix the issue with summary not loading

Hide shows with no missing specials when filter is active

Add HasMissingSpecials to ShowInfo, populated via a single bulk query
for virtual (LocationType=Virtual) Season 0 episodes in the library —
two queries total regardless of library size.

When 'Only show missing specials' is checked, the shows list is filtered
to only shows with HasMissingSpecials=true. Text search and the missing
filter compose correctly. Already-open specials panels are still filtered
at the episode level as before.

Bump version 1.0.0.6 -> 1.0.0.7

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Move 'Only show missing' to section-level checkbox

Replace per-show filter bars with a single 'Only show missing specials'
checkbox placed below the Filter shows textbox. Toggling it immediately
filters all already-open specials panels, and newly opened panels respect
the current state. Checkbox resets on page navigation.

Bump version 1.0.0.5 -> 1.0.0.6

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Remove per-item event handler, add missing episode filter

- Remove LibraryItemAddedHandler: the ItemAdded event fired once per
  episode during scans, causing repeated removal runs. ILibraryPostScanTask
  (SpecialsRemovalTask) covers all scan scenarios as Jellyfin has a single
  scan path (ValidateMediaLibrary), so no coverage is lost.
- Add Missing property to EpisodeInfo (LocationType == Virtual) so the
  config UI can identify specials with no media file on disk.
- Add 'Only show missing (N)' checkbox to the per-show specials panel;
  only shown when at least one missing episode exists. Missing episodes
  also get a faint '(missing)' badge in the title column.
- Bump version 1.0.0.3 -> 1.0.0.5
- Add .github/copilot-instructions.md

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix show handling dropdown empty - serialize Handling as int not string

Jellyfin's JSON serializer outputs enums as strings (e.g. 'Default', 'Remove').
The UI compared against integers (0, 1, 2) causing no option to match and the
dropdown appearing blank. Changed ShowInfo.Handling to int so it always
serializes as a number matching the option values in the select element.

Bumps to 1.0.0.3.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Bump to 1.0.0.1; skip zip overwrite if version already published

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix dispatch step: move secret to job env so if condition evaluates correctly

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
